body: ## [4.0.4](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.0.3...v4.0.4) (2017-06-19) ### Bug Fixes * **MultiIndex:** handle switch between mono and multi index (algolia/react-instantsearch#132) ([ad70c1d](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/ad70c1d))
